stemHtml: A transport aircraft needs to be flown back to the maintenance facility empty following a cabin pressurisation issue. What should the crew be aware of regarding the one-engine inoperative controllability after takeoff?

options.a: An increased safety margin to VS due to the low operating speeds associated with low mass
options.b: A decreased safety margin to V<sub>MC</sub> due to the low operating speeds associated with low mass
options.c: An increased safety margin to VMC due to the high rudder ineffectiveness at low altitudes
options.d: A decreased safety margin to V<sub>MC</sub> due to the high rudder ineffectiveness at low altitudes
